meta.notes: Conservative tick (pageBudget=50, timeBudgetMs=60000) for the historical /insights backfill. Endpoint is /api/meta/archive/metrics-backfill. Distinct from the metadata-only archive backfill (archive-backfill-cron.json @ :22 every 6h) — both jobs use independent ingestion_cursors rows and independent automation_runs names. Cadence is every 30 minutes at :12 and :42 to stay clear of the live sync (:07 in hourly-instagram-live-sync.json) and the metadata backfill (:22 in archive-backfill-cron.json). Workflow imports as INACTIVE; activate manually only after a successful manual dryRun call. Token reuses N8N_API_KEY shared with /api/meta/sync.
